nodes.title: Prompter
widgets_values: You're a bot that's supposed to extract a description of the clothes on the image and then respond with only a description of that clothes. NOTHING ELSE! Describe only the clothes, without any introduction, and provide  description.

nodes.title: XX łączniik
widgets_values: Photorealistic portrait of the exact woman from reference photo 1, keeping her face, hair, and specific features completely unchanged. Change only outfit/clothes. She is wearing the precise outfit from reference photo 2:
